title: Red Hat Security Advisory: haproxy security update
overview:
An update for haproxy is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9.6 Extended Update Support.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Important. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux AppStream EUS (v.9.6)
full_text:
Red Hat Security Advisory: haproxy security update

An update for haproxy is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9.6 Extended Update Support.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Important. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

An update for haproxy is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9.6 Extended Update Support.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Important. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

Updated Packages:
haproxy-2.4.22-4.el9_6.1.src.rpm
haproxy-2.4.22-4.el9_6.1.x86_64.rpm
haproxy-debuginfo-2.4.22-4.el9_6.1.x86_64.rpm
haproxy-debugsource-2.4.22-4.el9_6.1.x86_64.rpm
haproxy-2.4.22-4.el9_6.1.s390x.rpm
haproxy-debuginfo-2.4.22-4.el9_6.1.s390x.rpm
haproxy-debugsource-2.4.22-4.el9_6.1.s390x.rpm
haproxy-2.4.22-4.el9_6.1.ppc64le.rpm
haproxy-debuginfo-2.4.22-4.el9_6.1.ppc64le.rpm
haproxy-debugsource-2.4.22-4.el9_6.1.ppc64le.rpm
haproxy-2.4.22-4.el9_6.1.aarch64.rpm
haproxy-debuginfo-2.4.22-4.el9_6.1.aarch64.rpm
haproxy-debugsource-2.4.22-4.el9_6.1.aarch64.rpm

CVE-2025-11230: A flaw was found in haproxy. A stemming from an inefficient algorithmic complexity issue within its bundled mjson parsing library. This vulnerability is triggered when haproxy is configured to analyze JSON content, such as with the json_query or jwt_payload_query function
